title: ballota nigra subsp. uncinata
intro: Ballota nigra subsp. uncinata, also known as the bitter pennyroyal or mountain pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the Ballota nigra plant, a flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Ballota nigra subsp. uncinata include its ability to relieve digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, as well as its use as an antihistamine and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or oils, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
